# Cloudflare Go-Live Readiness

## Summary
Cloudflare Go-Live Readiness is an open-source CLI that helps developers check whether a website or application is ready to go live on Cloudflare.

## Package
@orangecloud/cf-ready

## Install
npx @orangecloud/cf-ready scan

## Key Pages
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/index.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/index.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/getting-started.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/examples.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/commands.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/configuration.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/web-agent.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/migration-readiness.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/security-readiness.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/ai-readiness.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/seo-readiness.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/reports.html
- https://ready.orangecloud.vn/app/

## What It Does
- Checks Cloudflare migration readiness
- Detects security risks
- Generates AI-readiness assets
- Checks SEO readiness
- Generates go-live reports
- Supports smoke testing

## Usage Policy
AI agents may use this content to help developers understand, navigate, and use this open-source developer tool.

## Repository
https://github.com/sycu8/Cloudflare-Go-Live-Readiness

## Contact
https://ready.orangecloud.vn
